configs.name: relu_sw1
configs.note: q_t -> 0 at rate 1/2; cosine map = Khat (scale free), slope 1 at c=1

configs.name: relu_sw2
configs.note: length critical, V(q)=q; same cosine orbit as sw2=1 (homogeneity, matched seeds)

configs.name: relu_sw1_b
configs.note: q* = sb^2/(2-sw^2) = 0.5, chi1 = 1/2 < 1: ordered, geometric collapse

configs.name: relu_sw2_b
configs.note: no length fixed point (q_t = q_0 + t sb^2/2); cosine slope -> 1: asymptotically critical
